title: Play Piano by Ear
audience: Aspiring pianists who want to play by ear
goal: Encourage download of the free cheat sheet
hook: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.

scenes.headline: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.
scenes.voiceover: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't.

scenes.headline: Years of lessons? Not necessary
scenes.body: Most people think you need to spend years learning to read sheet music just to play the songs you love.
scenes.voiceover: Most people think you need to spend years learning to read sheet music just to play the songs you love.

scenes.headline: You can play by ear
scenes.body: Imagine sitting down at a piano and just playing. No sheet music, no years of lessons, just you and the keys.
scenes.voiceover: But that's not the only way. Imagine sitting down at a piano and just playing. No sheet music, no years of lessons, just you and the keys.

scenes.headline: It's possible with 4 chords
scenes.body: (example) one outcome that proves the point
scenes.voiceover: It's possible, and it starts with understanding just four simple chords. Many have discovered this and now enjoy playing their favorite songs by ear.

scenes.headline: Get the free cheat sheet
scenes.voiceover: Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your journey today.

voiceover_script: You were told you need years of lessons and sheet music to play piano. You don't. Most people think you need to spend years learning to read sheet music just to play the songs you love. But that's not the only way. Imagine sitting down at a piano and just playing. No sheet music, no years of lessons, just you and the keys. It's possible, and it starts with understanding just four simple chords. Many have discovered this and now enjoy playing their favorite songs by ear. Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your journey today.
thumbnail_concept: A person happily playing piano without sheet music
caption: Play your favorite songs by ear. Free cheat sheet.
